name: Eczacibasi Yatirim Holding Ortakligi A.S.
summary: Eczacibasi Yatirim Holding Ortakligi A.S., through its interests in affiliate companies, engages in the manufacture and sale of bathroom and kitchen faucets and bathroom accessories. It is also involved in the sale of construction and installation materials, as well as provides after-sales services; develops and produces smart cards; and invests in real estate. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Eczacibasi Yatirim Holding Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of Eczacibasi Holding A.S.
